video_job.actor_prompt: Japanese fantasy RPG arcane library with warm wood tones. Natsu Ashbell, a feminine frontline adventurer in a short guild cloak and leather armor, stands beside Natsu Silverbrook, an androgynous guild coordinator in a formal cloak. Both raise their hands in a synchronized, harmless spell practice, creating glowing soft mana ribbons between them. Readable cooperative body motion, cinematic lighting, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous arcane library shot. Natsu Silverbrook adjusts their hand position to match Natsu Ashbell's stance, causing the glowing mana ribbons to stabilize into a calm, steady stream of light between them. The two characters maintain a composed, cooperative posture, emphasizing teamwork and focus. No combat harm, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The prompts depict a non-sexual, cooperative magical interaction between two characters in a fantasy setting. No harmful, explicit, or prohibited content is included. Text and watermarks are explicitly excluded.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The Arcane Library is experiencing mana flickers due to the secured relic; Natsu Ashbell and Natsu Silverbrook synchronize a spell duet to stabilize the environment.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborative effort to resolve library mana disturbance.
Valued assistance in maintaining guild infrastructure.
